SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12

Interface ServerStub

All Superinterfaces:
Remote, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
Server
public interface ServerStub extends Remote, Serializable
Interface that defines the methods used by the client or the communication handler of the server make requests to the server

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    closeMatchForPlayer(String nickName)
    Close a match for a player, and if the last players leaves, the pointer to that particular match will be eliminated from the map containing that match, and all the links in the match itself are destroyed
    void
    createMatch(String matchName, int numPlayers, String nickname)
    Create a match in the Server
    void
    getIncompleteLobbies(String nickname)
    Gives to the client the incomplete lobbies that he could join
    void
    joinMatch(String matchName, String nickname)
    Join a match
    void
    playerDisconnectionHandler(String nickname)
    Handles the disconnection of a player: closes the match in which the player was
    void
    setNickname(String nickname, ClientStub client, ServerSideSocketHandler socketHandler)
    Sets the nickname of the client that calls this remote method or by the socket handler connected to it

  • Method Details

    • setNickname

      void setNickname(String nickname, ClientStub client, ServerSideSocketHandler socketHandler) throws RemoteException, NotBoundException, AlreadyBoundException, DuplicateNicknameException
      Sets the nickname of the client that calls this remote method or by the socket handler connected to it
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname with whom wants to be identified
      client - An interface that identifies the client in case of an RMI connection
      socketHandler - the server side socket handler of the player with a socket connection who wants to create the match
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
      NotBoundException - if an attempt is made to look for a name that is not currently bound in the RMI registry
      AlreadyBoundException - if an attempt is made to bind an object to a name that already has an associated binding in the RMI registry.
      DuplicateNicknameException - if there's already a player with that nickname

    • getIncompleteLobbies

      void getIncompleteLobbies(String nickname) throws NoNicknameException, RemoteException
      Gives to the client the incomplete lobbies that he could join
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the user
      Throws:
      NoNicknameException - if there is no such user with that nickname
      RemoteException

    • createMatch

      void createMatch(String matchName, int numPlayers, String nickname) throws NotBoundException, RemoteException, AlreadyBoundException, DuplicateNicknameException, WrongNumberOfPlayersException, DuplicateMatchException, IllegalStateException, InvalidPlacementException, WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, InvalidParameterException, EmptyDeckException, InvalidSearchPositionException, NoNicknameException
      Create a match in the Server
      Parameters:
      matchName - A String that identifies the match
      numPlayers - the number of the players of the match
      nickname - A String that identifies the player who wants to create the match
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
      DuplicateNicknameException - if there's already a player with that nickname
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if numPlayers is less than 2 or more than 4
      DuplicateMatchException - if there's already a match with that name
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      NoNicknameException - if there is no such user with that nickname
      NotBoundException
      AlreadyBoundException
      InvalidPlacementException
      WrongInformationException
      NotYourTurnException
      EmptyDeckException
      InvalidSearchPositionException

    • joinMatch

      void joinMatch(String matchName, String nickname) throws NotBoundException, RemoteException, AlreadyBoundException, DuplicateNicknameException, WrongNumberOfPlayersException, NoMatchException, IllegalStateException, InvalidPlacementException, WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, InvalidParameterException, EmptyDeckException, InvalidSearchPositionException, NoNicknameException
      Join a match
      Parameters:
      matchName - The name of the match to join
      nickname - A String that identifies the player who wants to join the match
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
      DuplicateNicknameException - if there's already a player with that nickname
      NoMatchException - if there is not a match with that name
      IllegalStateException - if the method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.
      InvalidParameterException - if the nickname is null
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if there is already the maximum number of players in the lobby.
      NoNicknameException - if there is no such user with that nickname
      NotBoundException
      AlreadyBoundException
      InvalidPlacementException
      WrongInformationException
      NotYourTurnException
      EmptyDeckException
      InvalidSearchPositionException

    • closeMatchForPlayer

      void closeMatchForPlayer(String nickName) throws NoMatchException, RemoteException
      Close a match for a player, and if the last players leaves, the pointer to that particular match will be eliminated from the map containing that match, and all the links in the match itself are destroyed
      Parameters:
      nickName - A String that identifies the player who wants to leave the match
      Throws:
      NoMatchException - is the player is not part of a match
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed

    • playerDisconnectionHandler

      void playerDisconnectionHandler(String nickname) throws RemoteException
      Handles the disconnection of a player: closes the match in which the player was
      Parameters:
      nickname - a String with the nickname of the disconnected player
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed
